overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay from Dishonored 2, beginning on a sunlit stone terrace overlooking the city of Karnaca with its distinctive flat-topped mountain, then transitioning to a dark underground canal dock. The footage features high-quality cinematic rendering with dramatic golden hour lighting and detailed industrial-steampunk environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury stone terrace with panoramic city overlook

events.description: camera turns right to reveal lounge seating area with circular patterned rug
camera turns left back toward the city view and flat-topped mountain vista

agents.ego_description: slowly walking around the terrace, examining the furniture and enjoying the panoramic city view of Karnaca

entered.detail: tall ornate stone columns supporting the terrace roof
decorative black metal railing overlooking the city drop
wooden lounge chairs with white cushions arranged for relaxation
large circular rug with geometric patterns on the wooden deck
distinctive massive flat-topped mountain dominating the horizon
dense urban city sprawling below the terrace with distant towers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a luxurious stone terrace during golden hour, with tall columns and ornate railings framing a breathtaking view of the city of Karnaca and its iconic flat-topped mountain. The camera explores the space, revealing wooden lounge furniture and a circular patterned rug bathed in warm sunlight, before turning back to the panoramic vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground canal dock with industrial stone architecture

events.description: abrupt transition from bright terrace to dark underground canal environment with water and stone arches
text 'Cyria Gardens' appears on screen identifying the underground location

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock beside the canal, approaching the stone archway and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: woman in white coat standing on the dock looking toward the water

entered.detail: large stone archway leading deeper into the underground canal system
dark still water filling the canal channel alongside the dock
small wooden boat with copper and brass mechanical components and a lit lantern
weathered wooden planks forming the walkway along the canal edge
large metal pipes running along the stone walls of the canal
tall historic stone buildings visible through the archway opening

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a dark, enclosed underground canal dock with weathered wooden walkways and still black water. A vintage motorboat with a glowing lantern is moored alongside the dock, while a woman in a white coat stands nearby. The camera proceeds along the dock toward a stone archway revealing towering buildings in the distance, with the location identified as 'Cyria Gardens'.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sun-drenched luxury terrace into the oppressive shadows of an underground canal. It begins amidst tall columns and ornate railings on a stone balcony, where warm golden hour light illuminates wooden lounge furniture and a circular patterned rug against the backdrop of Karnaca's flat-topped mountain. As the perspective shifts away from the panoramic vista, the scene plunges into a dark, enclosed dock characterized by weathered wooden walkways and still black water. The camera then glides past a moored vintage motorboat with a glowing lantern and a woman in a white coat, proceeding through a stone archway that finally reveals the towering buildings of Cyria Gardens in the distance.
